metadata.description: Multi-tentacled orchestration plugin for Factory AI Droid

plugins.name: claude-octopus
plugins.description: v9.47.0 - completes the #498 lifecycle-event vocabulary (review.finding + synthesis across review, parallel, council, and debate), all rendered by octo-hud; plus a /octo:plan plan-mode degradation signal and CI updates. 32 personas, 49 commands, 54 skills. Run /octo:setup.
